items.name_en: BV patti bag Full and three-dimensional padded leather strip, understated luxury is often hidden in details and craftsmanship. This bag has a casual opening, simple and elegant overall design, and comes with a detachable shoulder strap for crossbody or handheld wear to match different outfits. The interior features double-layering and a zippered pocket for secure storage of private items. Whether for capacity, style, or privacy, it offers a full sense of security.

items.name_en: In stock
items.name_cn:
In stock
Inspired by Brancusi's 20th-century modern sculpture "Bird in Space"
Muse brass handle, unique craftsmanship makes each handle one-of-a-kind, highlighting a precious sculptural feel
The shoulder strap features a metal chain with hardware inlay, adding depth to the bag; the hardware moon god design exudes a premium look
The Sardine handle creates a high-end modern look! The Sardine bag uses Intrecciato weaving to honor the brand's craftsmanship. The handle design creates a strong contrast, presenting an artistic design concept. The finishing of the Muse brass hardware is completed through multiple processes, and exquisite craftsmanship makes each handle unique
Style: 776768
Size: 33*20*4cm (Strap length 35cm)

items.name_en: BV 2024 Fall/Winter New Arrival: Super Unique Wax Leather Tote. Made from soft calfskin, it feels soft and warm. The simple colors are very attractive, and the capacity is amazing; a laptop fits easily. It is unisex, truly a must-have. Cool, chic, and premium. Let it become your most intimate bag this autumn.

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA New ANDIAMO Tote. This denim woven bag perfectly blends retro and trendy! Handwoven denim, every thread carries craftsmanship, and the color-block design breaks the mold. Not only is the capacity impressive, but it also adds a touch of fun and cuteness, easily holding various styles. Exquisite metal accessories shine on the ruggedness of the denim, combining toughness with softness. Denim naturally brings a youthful and energetic vibe, giving a feeling of both retro classicism and relaxed freedom. During the weaving process, the bag is hand-woven with denim through small gaps into the leather surface, a truly exquisite technique! The capacity is beyond doubt, it can fit an umbrella and a water bottle!

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA new mini COBBLE hobo bag. This season's mini Cobble series brings a new handbag style. The bag body resembles a 'hobo' shape, bringing good luck for the whole autumn and winter! This hobo bag is made of three pieces of padding, with a seamless body and no lining, showcasing quiet strength. The bag is carefully designed to create a three-dimensional feel. The connection points and edges are finished with leather strips for a minimalist look. The bag has no separate lining, allowing you to appreciate the lamb leather inside and out, which is beautiful both inside and out. The top handle is made of a leather-wrapped rope, quite sturdy. The detachable shoulder strap is fixed with a leather ring on the bag. Can be carried by hand, worn on the shoulder, or crossbody. Super easy to match!

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta's 2024 Fall/Winter highlight, shining from the runway to the streets. It brings a rich retro vibe and easily creates different styles through versatile combinations. Whether for a professional office look or casual daily wear, the full-grain calfskin is a fashion element you cannot miss!
